channel.title: Dillon R. Carpenter: Field Notes
channel.description: Working notes on video, digital marketing, and getting small businesses seen. From Muncie, Indiana videographer and filmmaker Dillon R. Carpenter.

item.title: The video is done. Now what?
item.description: A finished video sitting in a folder isn't doing anything for anybody yet. Here's the after-the-shoot conversation I try to have with every client: cut it for where it actually plays, win the first frame, post where your buyers already are, turn one shoot into a month of content, and measure the thing that actually pays you.
